title: Law of Marriage (Functions of Deputy Registrars-General) Regulations, 1972
title_en: Law of Marriage (Functions of Deputy Registrars-General) Regulations, 1972

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Law of Marriage (Functions of Deputy Registrars-General) Regulations.

provisions.title: Deputy Registrar-General may perform functions of Registrar-General
provisions.content: Subject to the directions of the Registrar-General of Marriages and Divorces, it shall be lawful for a Deputy Registrar-General of Marriages and Divorces appointed under subsection (2) of section 3 of the Law of Marriage Act to perform all the functions of the Registrar-General under the said Act or any subsidiary legislation made thereunder.
